none.justification: Answer A gets the 14 in-file whole functions in ieee802_11.c and the 9 partial functions mostly right, but it explicitly excludes src/common/sae.c despite the GT requiring the Makefile-gated 35 whole functions. That misses the largest scoring dimension, so it is badly incomplete rather than mostly correct.

ccodegraph.justification: Answer B exactly matches the corrected GT: 49 whole functions (35 Makefile-gated src/common/sae.c + 14 ieee802_11.c) and 9 partial functions, with the correct src/ scope and exclusion of out-of-tree files.

lsp.justification: Answer C also matches the corrected GT counts and composition: 35 sae.c whole, 14 ieee802_11.c whole, and the same 9 partial functions across the expected 8 source files. The minor wording uncertainty around rsn_key_mgmt_to_bitfield does not change the listed function or counts.
